close_reason: Implemented goparse, buckgen libraries and CLI; integrated into Nix; removed gobuckify and patches
description:
Update nix/lib/deps-cell/adapters/go.nix to use buckgen instead of gobuckify.

## Changes Required

1. Replace gobuckify invocation (line 244) with buckgen
2. Remove scaffolding generation:
   - Remove go.mod generation (lines 209-220)
   - Remove main.go generation (lines 222-233)
   - Remove vendor/modules.txt generation (lines 197-205)
3. Update nix/buck2/go-deps-cell.nix to use buckgen package instead of gobuckify

## Validation
- Build godeps cell with new tool
- Verify generated rules.star files match expected format
- Test Go builds work correctly
title: Integrate buckgen into go-deps-cell
